description: This file serves as an adapter module for role-related database operations, mainly delegating to MySQL repository functions when the database engine is configured as MySQL. It provides functions to count, list, bulk insert, check existence, and search roles, with environment checks to ensure MySQL is configured before executing database operations.

methods.name: countRoles()
methods.description: Returns the count of roles if MySQL is configured; otherwise returns 0.

methods.name: listRoles({ limit = 1000 } = {})
methods.description: Lists roles, with an optional limit parameter, if MySQL is configured; otherwise returns an empty array.

methods.name: bulkInsertRoles(roles)
methods.description: Performs a bulk insert of roles into the database if MySQL is configured; otherwise returns an object indicating zero inserted records.

methods.name: roleExists(roleId)
methods.description: Checks if a role with the specified ID exists, if MySQL is configured; otherwise returns false.

methods.name: searchRoles({ q = '', industry = null, skills = [], minSalary = null, maxSalary = null, limit = 50 } = {})
methods.description: Performs a search for roles based on query parameters, only when using MySQL; catches exceptions and returns empty array on failure.

ctags.name: searchRoles
ctags.signature: ({ q = '', industry = null, skills = [], minSalary = null, maxSalary = null, limit = 50 } = {})
